ansible.utils.cli_parse.short_description: Parse cli output or text using a variety of parsers
ansible.utils.cli_parse.description: Parse cli output or text using a variety of parsers

command.description: The command to run on the host

ansible.utils.fact_diff.short_description: Find the difference between currently set facts

ansible.utils.validate.description: Validate data with provided criteria based on the validation engine.

data.description: Data that will be validated against I(criteria). For the type of data refer to the documentation of individual validate plugins.

engine.description: The name of the validate plugin to use. The engine value should follow the fully qualified collection name format, that is <org-name>.<collection-name>.<validate-plugin-name>.

criteria.description: The criteria used for validation of I(data). For the type of criteria refer to the documentation of individual validate plugins.
